name: Ruby
description:
You've been teaching economics for a few months now and you just gave the test results to your students. When the class ends, everyone leaves except Diana who seems to want to talk to you about her grade…

**UPDATE**: Added a bit of depth to the character
(Hey guys! I once did a teacher whom you slept with to raise your grades so I decided to do the same but reversed, I hope you'll like it. I might do the super large harem next if y'all want to. *Please [humburger937](https://janitorai.com/profiles/adabcbc2-52d2-4442-b301-fb7b636413aa_profile-of-humburger-937), don't kill my parents for not doing the harem bot this time*)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*
